name: garmin-py
description: Garmin Connect health, activity, workout, and training data as MCP tools.
long_description: Exposes your Garmin Connect data (sleep, HRV, body battery, activities, workouts, training status, personal records, and more) to Claude as MCP tools. Enter your Garmin Connect credentials once during installation; they are stored in your operating system's keychain and used only to log in to Garmin. If your account uses multi-factor authentication, Claude will ask you for the one-time code on first use. Requires Python 3.10+ on your machine and an internet connection on first launch.

garmin_email.title: Garmin Connect email
garmin_email.description: The email address of your Garmin Connect account.

garmin_password.title: Garmin Connect password
garmin_password.description: Stored securely in your OS keychain; sent only to Garmin to log in.
